## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on Aftershoot's goals, target audience, and content strategy for GrowthX's SEO engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goal: Scale non-branded organic traffic to attract relevant ICPs, especially for new product launches](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Target audience: Professional photographers (weddings, portraits, events) who view photography as income source](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Content strategy: Leverage existing creator content, explore repurposing opportunities, aim for 5 culling/editing sessions as key activation metric](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [90-day pilot to establish baseline, with full impact expected in 4-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)

## Topics

### Aftershoot's Business Goals

  - [Double active subscribers this year](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Drive new trials through marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Expand internationally through localization (website in multiple languages)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Successfully launch new products: AI Retouching (next month) and Raw Editing (H2)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Target Audience Refinement

  - [Focus on professional photographers who earn income from photography](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Key genres: Weddings, portraits, events, sports, headshots](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Avoid: Wildlife, street, landscape photographers (typically hobbyists)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
  - [Look for "client-driven" photography categories](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Leverage existing creator/influencer content for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [Explore repurposing opportunities (e.g., podcast transcripts to blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [Balance AI-generated content with photographer-created content](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [Aim for speed and efficiency as key value propositions in content](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

### Measurement and KPIs

  - [Primary metric: Active subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Content attribution: First-touch (14-day window)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Key activation metric: 5 culling/editing sessions during trial period](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2983.0)
  - [Tools: Post-hog for user behavior, Google Analytics for traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3574.0)

### SEO Engagement Process

  - [Week 1-2: Research, competitive analysis, initial content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
  - [Week 3-4: Refine inputs, establish content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)
  - [Month 2-3: Expect initial traffic uptick (150-200 clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3489.0)
  - [Month 4-6: Analyze traffic quality, conversion rates, adjust strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aftershoot to provide access to GSC, GA, Post-hog, and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3670.0)
  - [Aftershoot to review company brief and competitor analysis in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3670.0)
  - [GrowthX to schedule follow-up meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3670.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare initial content strategy and topic clusters for review](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3670.0)
  - [Align on specific L1/L2 metrics to track during the pilot phase](https://fathom.video/share/xmdfJ93L6kYNFQEHGMVyHz_q3m_n5yC7?tab=summary&timestamp=3641.0)
